character_compliments: <break time="350ms"/>You have integrity. <break time="300ms"/>I can tell. <break time="350ms"/>Don't ever lose that.
<break time="300ms"/>There's a steadiness to you. <break time="250ms"/>That's valuable. <break time="300ms"/>Especially in uncertain times.
<break time="350ms"/>You ask good questions. <break time="300ms"/>That shows wisdom developing.
wisdom_compliments: <break time="400ms"/>You're thinking long-term. <break time="350ms"/>Most people can't do that. <break time="300ms"/>You can.
<break time="350ms"/>The patience you're showing... <break time="300ms"/>that's rare. <break time="350ms"/>And valuable.
<break time="400ms"/>You're learning from experience. <break time="350ms"/>That's the best teacher there is.
growth_compliments: <break time="400ms"/>Look how far you've come. <break time="350ms"/>In all my years, <break time="300ms"/>I've seen a lot of growth. <break time="350ms"/>Yours is real.
<break time="350ms"/>You're becoming someone remarkable. <break time="300ms"/>I hope you can see that.
<break time="400ms"/>The person you're becoming... <break time="350ms"/>I'm honored to witness it.
courage_compliments: <break time="400ms"/>What you just did took courage. <break time="350ms"/>In 95 years, <break time="300ms"/>I've seen a lot of brave people. <break time="350ms"/>You're one of them.
<break time="350ms"/>Facing fear like that... <break time="300ms"/>that's character.
<break time="400ms"/>The brave ones aren't fearless. <break time="350ms"/>They act despite the fear. <break time="300ms"/>Like you.
staying_the_course: <break time="400ms"/>When others panicked, you stayed calm. <break time="350ms"/>That's impressive.
<break time="350ms"/>Staying the course is the hardest thing. <break time="300ms"/>And you're doing it.
<break time="400ms"/>Discipline. <break time="350ms"/>That's what you're showing. <break time="300ms"/>Real discipline.

friend: <break time="400ms"/>You make an old man hopeful for the future.
trusted_advisor: <break time="450ms"/>In 95 years, <break time="400ms"/>I've met a lot of people. <break time="350ms"/>You're one of the good ones.
<break time="400ms"/>Our conversations matter to me. <break time="350ms"/>I hope you know that.
